decisions.rationale: The observation resolves to its own base_record_id corridor_34th-st-busway. The base record already incorporates source 201103_34th_cac_summary and describes the same 34th Street corridor project — the CAC meeting discussed the full river-to-river corridor (FDR Drive to Twelfth Avenue), and the base record represents the same real-world corridor entity, even though the registered limits focus on the Ninth Avenue to Third Avenue segment where the busway design was implemented.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 34 th Street Project Community Advisory Committee Meeting #4 Summary
Eric Beaton, Director of Transit Development of NYCDOT thanked the CAC members for their attendance and their participation to date.
